description: COMP-3 sign nibble handling: positive (C), negative (D), unsigned (F) with arithmetic
notes: RESULT-1: 100.50 + (-200.75) = -100.25. RESULT-2: -200.75 * -1 = +200.75. RESULT-3: 300.25 + (-200.75) = +99.50. Sign propagation through COMP-3 arithmetic is critical for bank ledger calculations. Expected display format may vary — engine may show with or without leading sign/zeros.
